channel.title: Oidc on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Oidc on Pi Stack

item.title: Dex vs Kanidm vs Rauthy: Lightweight Self-Hosted SSO & OIDC Guide 2026
item.description: When you run a self-hosted infrastructure with multiple services, managing authentication across every application becomes a pain point quickly. Running separate login systems for Grafana, Gitea, Nextcloud, and your internal tools means separate passwords, separate user databases, and a support nightmare.
